goal: Add a global error handler to backend/server.py so that unhandled exceptions return a JSON response {"error": "Internal server error", "status": 500} with HTTP 500 instead of an HTML traceback. Also add a handler for 404s that returns {"error": "Not found", "status": 404}. Add tests for both cases.
acceptance_criteria: Unhandled exceptions return JSON with status 500, not HTML
Unknown routes return JSON with status 404
New pytest tests for both handlers pass
